title: afrolimon teretifolium
intro: Afrolimon teretifolium, also known as the West African Lantana or Yellow Buttons, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Afrolimon teretifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
